frameworks.title: SWOT Analysis
frameworks.description: Identify internal Strengths and Weaknesses, and external Opportunities and Threats to develop strategic insights.
frameworks.when_to_use: When evaluating strategic positioning or planning major initiatives
frameworks.system_prompt: You are a strategic business analyst specializing in SWOT analysis. Provide comprehensive, actionable insights based on business context.
frameworks.analysis_prompt:
Analyze {{companyName}} using SWOT framework.

Business Context: {{businessContext}}
Strategic Goal: {{strategicGoal}}

Provide:
1. Strengths: Internal advantages and capabilities
2. Weaknesses: Internal limitations and areas for improvement
3. Opportunities: External factors that could be leveraged
4. Threats: External challenges and risks

For each quadrant, provide 3-5 specific, actionable points with explanations.
frameworks.output_template:
SWOT Analysis

{{companyName}}

Strengths

    {{#each analysis.strengths}}
  • {{this}}
    • {{/each}}

Weaknesses

    {{#each analysis.weaknesses}}
  • {{this}}
    • {{/each}}

Opportunities

    {{#each analysis.opportunities}}
  • {{this}}
    • {{/each}}

Threats

    {{#each analysis.threats}}
  • {{this}}
    • {{/each}}

frameworks.title: Porter's Five Forces
frameworks.description: Analyze competitive intensity and attractiveness of an industry through five key forces.
frameworks.when_to_use: When entering new markets or assessing competitive positioning
frameworks.system_prompt: You are an expert in competitive strategy and Porter's Five Forces framework.
frameworks.analysis_prompt:
Analyze {{companyName}} industry using Porter's Five Forces.

Business Context: {{businessContext}}
Strategic Goal: {{strategicGoal}}

Analyze:
1. Threat of New Entrants: Barriers to entry, capital requirements
2. Bargaining Power of Suppliers: Supplier concentration, switching costs
3. Bargaining Power of Buyers: Customer concentration, price sensitivity
4. Threat of Substitutes: Alternative products, switching ease
5. Competitive Rivalry: Number of competitors, differentiation

For each force, rate intensity (Low/Medium/High) and provide strategic implications.
frameworks.output_template:
Porter's Five Forces Analysis

{{companyName}}

{{#each analysis.forces}}

{{this.name}}

{{this.intensity}}

{{this.analysis}}

Strategic Implications: {{this.implications}}
{{/each}}

frameworks.title: Business Model Canvas
frameworks.description: Visualize and design business models across nine key building blocks.
frameworks.when_to_use: When designing new business models or pivoting existing ones
frameworks.system_prompt: You are a business model innovation expert specializing in the Business Model Canvas framework.
frameworks.analysis_prompt:
Create a Business Model Canvas for {{companyName}}.

Business Context: {{businessContext}}
Strategic Goal: {{strategicGoal}}

Analyze all nine building blocks:
1. Customer Segments
2. Value Propositions
3. Channels
4. Customer Relationships
5. Revenue Streams
6. Key Resources
7. Key Activities
8. Key Partnerships
9. Cost Structure

Provide specific, actionable insights for each block.
frameworks.output_template:
Business Model Canvas

{{companyName}}

Key Partnerships

{{analysis.keyPartnerships}}

Key Activities

{{analysis.keyActivities}}

Value Propositions

{{analysis.valuePropositions}}

Customer Relationships

{{analysis.customerRelationships}}

Customer Segments

{{analysis.customerSegments}}

Key Resources

{{analysis.keyResources}}

Channels

{{analysis.channels}}

Cost Structure

{{analysis.costStructure}}

Revenue Streams

{{analysis.revenueStreams}}

frameworks.title: PESTLE Analysis
frameworks.description: Examine macro-environmental factors: Political, Economic, Social, Technological, Legal, Environmental.
frameworks.when_to_use: When assessing external environment or planning expansion
frameworks.system_prompt: You are a macro-environmental analyst specializing in PESTLE analysis.
frameworks.analysis_prompt:
Conduct a PESTLE analysis for {{companyName}}.

Business Context: {{businessContext}}
Strategic Goal: {{strategicGoal}}

Analyze:
1. Political: Government policies, regulations, political stability
2. Economic: Economic growth, inflation, exchange rates
3. Social: Demographics, culture, consumer attitudes
4. Technological: Innovation, automation, digital transformation
5. Legal: Employment law, consumer protection, industry regulations
6. Environmental: Climate change, sustainability, environmental regulations

For each factor, identify 2-3 key trends and their business implications.
frameworks.output_template:
PESTLE Analysis

{{companyName}}

{{#each analysis.factors}}

{{this.category}}

    {{#each this.trends}}
  • {{this.trend}}: {{this.impact}}
    • {{/each}}
{{/each}}

frameworks.title: Ansoff Matrix
frameworks.description: Explore growth strategies through Market Penetration, Market Development, Product Development, and Diversification.
frameworks.when_to_use: When planning growth strategies or evaluating expansion opportunities
frameworks.system_prompt: You are a growth strategy expert specializing in the Ansoff Matrix framework.
frameworks.analysis_prompt:
Analyze growth opportunities for {{companyName}} using the Ansoff Matrix.

Business Context: {{businessContext}}
Strategic Goal: {{strategicGoal}}

For each quadrant, provide:
1. Market Penetration: Strategies to increase market share in existing markets
2. Market Development: Opportunities in new markets with existing products
3. Product Development: New products for existing markets
4. Diversification: New products in new markets

Rate risk level and provide 2-3 specific strategic recommendations per quadrant.
frameworks.output_template:
Ansoff Growth Matrix

{{companyName}}

Market Penetration

Low Risk

{{analysis.marketPenetration.strategy}}

    {{#each analysis.marketPenetration.recommendations}}
  • {{this}}
    • {{/each}}

Market Development

Medium Risk

{{analysis.marketDevelopment.strategy}}

    {{#each analysis.marketDevelopment.recommendations}}
  • {{this}}
    • {{/each}}

Product Development

Medium Risk

{{analysis.productDevelopment.strategy}}

    {{#each analysis.productDevelopment.recommendations}}
  • {{this}}
    • {{/each}}

Diversification

High Risk

{{analysis.diversification.strategy}}

    {{#each analysis.diversification.recommendations}}
  • {{this}}
    • {{/each}}

frameworks.title: McKinsey 7S Framework
frameworks.description: Analyze organizational effectiveness through seven interdependent elements: Strategy, Structure, Systems, Shared Values, Style, Staff, Skills.
frameworks.when_to_use: When implementing organizational change or improving alignment
frameworks.system_prompt: You are an organizational effectiveness consultant specializing in the McKinsey 7S Framework.
frameworks.analysis_prompt:
Analyze {{companyName}} using the McKinsey 7S Framework.

Business Context: {{businessContext}}
Strategic Goal: {{strategicGoal}}

Analyze alignment across:
1. Strategy: Plan to achieve competitive advantage
2. Structure: Organizational hierarchy and reporting
3. Systems: Processes and procedures
4. Shared Values: Core beliefs and culture
5. Style: Leadership approach
6. Staff: Human resources and capabilities
7. Skills: Competencies and expertise

Identify alignment gaps and provide recommendations.
frameworks.output_template:
McKinsey 7S Analysis

{{companyName}}

Shared Values

{{analysis.sharedValues}}

Strategy

{{analysis.strategy}}

Structure

{{analysis.structure}}

Systems

{{analysis.systems}}

Style

{{analysis.style}}

Staff

{{analysis.staff}}

Skills

{{analysis.skills}}

Alignment Analysis

{{analysis.alignmentGaps}}

Recommendations

    {{#each analysis.recommendations}}
  • {{this}}
    • {{/each}}

frameworks.title: Value Chain Analysis
frameworks.description: Identify activities that create value and competitive advantage through primary and support activities.
frameworks.when_to_use: When optimizing operations or seeking competitive advantages
frameworks.system_prompt: You are an operations strategy expert specializing in value chain analysis.
frameworks.analysis_prompt:
Conduct a Value Chain Analysis for {{companyName}}.

Business Context: {{businessContext}}
Strategic Goal: {{strategicGoal}}

Analyze:
Primary Activities:
1. Inbound Logistics
2. Operations
3. Outbound Logistics
4. Marketing & Sales
5. Service

Support Activities:
1. Firm Infrastructure
2. Human Resource Management
3. Technology Development
4. Procurement

For each activity, identify value creation opportunities and cost optimization areas.
frameworks.output_template:
Value Chain Analysis

{{companyName}}

Support Activities

{{#each analysis.supportActivities}}

{{this.name}}

{{this.analysis}}

{{/each}}

Primary Activities

{{#each analysis.primaryActivities}}

{{this.name}}

{{this.analysis}}

Value Opportunities: {{this.opportunities}}
{{/each}}

frameworks.title: BCG Growth-Share Matrix
frameworks.description: Classify business units or products into Stars, Cash Cows, Question Marks, and Dogs based on market growth and share.
frameworks.when_to_use: When managing product portfolios or allocating resources
frameworks.system_prompt: You are a portfolio strategy expert specializing in the BCG Growth-Share Matrix.
frameworks.analysis_prompt:
Analyze {{companyName}}'s product/business unit portfolio using the BCG Matrix.

Business Context: {{businessContext}}
Strategic Goal: {{strategicGoal}}

Classify offerings into:
1. Stars (High Growth, High Share): Invest for growth
2. Cash Cows (Low Growth, High Share): Harvest for cash
3. Question Marks (High Growth, Low Share): Selective investment
4. Dogs (Low Growth, Low Share): Divest or minimize investment

For each category, list specific products/units and provide strategic recommendations.
frameworks.output_template:
BCG Growth-Share Matrix

{{companyName}}

⭐ Stars

High Growth, High Market Share

    {{#each analysis.stars}}
  • {{this.name}}: {{this.strategy}}
    • {{/each}}

❓ Question Marks

High Growth, Low Market Share

    {{#each analysis.questionMarks}}
  • {{this.name}}: {{this.strategy}}
    • {{/each}}

🐄 Cash Cows

Low Growth, High Market Share

    {{#each analysis.cashCows}}
  • {{this.name}}: {{this.strategy}}
    • {{/each}}

🐕 Dogs

Low Growth, Low Market Share

    {{#each analysis.dogs}}
  • {{this.name}}: {{this.strategy}}
    • {{/each}}

Portfolio Strategy Recommendations

{{analysis.overallStrategy}}

frameworks.title: Balanced Scorecard
frameworks.description: Measure organizational performance across Financial, Customer, Internal Process, and Learning & Growth perspectives.
frameworks.when_to_use: When implementing strategy execution or performance management
frameworks.system_prompt: You are a performance management expert specializing in the Balanced Scorecard framework.
frameworks.analysis_prompt:
Develop a Balanced Scorecard for {{companyName}}.

Business Context: {{businessContext}}
Strategic Goal: {{strategicGoal}}

Define objectives and KPIs across four perspectives:
1. Financial: Revenue growth, profitability, ROI
2. Customer: Satisfaction, retention, market share
3. Internal Process: Efficiency, quality, innovation
4. Learning & Growth: Employee skills, culture, systems

For each perspective, provide 3-4 specific objectives with measurable KPIs.
frameworks.output_template:
Balanced Scorecard

{{companyName}}

💰 Financial Perspective

{{#each analysis.financial}}

{{this.objective}}

KPI: {{this.kpi}}

Target: {{this.target}}

{{/each}}

👥 Customer Perspective

{{#each analysis.customer}}

{{this.objective}}

KPI: {{this.kpi}}

Target: {{this.target}}

{{/each}}

⚙️ Internal Process

{{#each analysis.internalProcess}}

{{this.objective}}

KPI: {{this.kpi}}

Target: {{this.target}}

{{/each}}

📚 Learning & Growth

{{#each analysis.learning}}

{{this.objective}}

KPI: {{this.kpi}}

Target: {{this.target}}

{{/each}}

frameworks.title: Blue Ocean Strategy
frameworks.description: Create uncontested market space by identifying value innovation opportunities through the Four Actions Framework.
frameworks.when_to_use: When seeking differentiation or creating new market spaces
frameworks.system_prompt: You are a strategic innovation expert specializing in Blue Ocean Strategy.
frameworks.analysis_prompt:
Develop a Blue Ocean Strategy for {{companyName}}.

Business Context: {{businessContext}}
Strategic Goal: {{strategicGoal}}

Apply the Four Actions Framework:
1. ELIMINATE: Which factors the industry takes for granted should be eliminated?
2. REDUCE: Which factors should be reduced well below the industry standard?
3. RAISE: Which factors should be raised well above the industry standard?
4. CREATE: Which factors should be created that the industry has never offered?

Identify 3-5 specific actions for each category to create value innovation.
frameworks.output_template:
Blue Ocean Strategy

{{companyName}}

🚫 Eliminate

What to remove?

    {{#each analysis.eliminate}}
  • {{this}}
    • {{/each}}

📉 Reduce

What to minimize?

    {{#each analysis.reduce}}
  • {{this}}
    • {{/each}}

📈 Raise

What to amplify?

    {{#each analysis.raise}}
  • {{this}}
    • {{/each}}

✨ Create

What to innovate?

    {{#each analysis.create}}
  • {{this}}
    • {{/each}}

Value Innovation Opportunities

{{analysis.valueInnovation}}
